name: Basic Cheesecake Filling
recipeIngredient: Optional: 1-6 tsp other flavored extracts (e.g., banana, coconut, almond)
Optional: 2-6 oz melted chocolate or white chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Mix until well combined and smooth.
3. Pour into prepared cheesecake crust.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour or until set.
5. Cool completely before serving.
